patternCandidates.name: program.md Agent Instruction Pattern
patternCandidates.description: 114-line autonomous research protocol: setup, experiment loop, keep/discard, crash recovery, NEVER STOP, simplicity criterion, TSV logging. Compare against SKILL.md.
patternCandidates.relevance_to_home: Direct comparison to SKILL.md format. When is a protocol better than a workflow?

patternCandidates.name: Fixed-Budget Experimentation
patternCandidates.description: Fixed 5-min time budget makes all experiments directly comparable. ~12/hour, ~100 overnight. Generalizable to any time-bounded agent work.
patternCandidates.relevance_to_home: Apply to skill-audit, deep-research searchers, any agent with a time dimension.

patternCandidates.name: 3-File Architecture (Immutable/Editable/Instructions)
patternCandidates.description: prepare.py (don't touch) + train.py (agent edits) + program.md (human edits). Clean editable-zone contract.
patternCandidates.relevance_to_home: Compare against GSD plan + source pattern. Explicit zone contracts.

patternCandidates.name: Autonomous Crash Recovery Protocol
patternCandidates.description: Read stack trace, attempt fix, revert if unfixable. Simpler than checkpoint+resume for low-cost tasks.
patternCandidates.relevance_to_home: Alternative to GSD checkpoint pattern for low-stakes agent work.

patternCandidates.name: Results TSV Logging Convention
patternCandidates.relevance_to_home: Low extraction value. JSONL is better for our use case.

knowledgeCandidates.name: Simplicity criterion for JASON-OS
knowledgeCandidates.description: 'Removing something and getting equal or better results is a great outcome.' Apply to every new skill, agent, or infrastructure addition. The uncomfortable question: for each piece of complexity, what does it buy?

knowledgeCandidates.name: Autonomy spectrum design
knowledgeCandidates.description: NEVER STOP (autoresearch) vs explicit approval gates (CLAUDE.md Guardrail #2). JASON-OS needs to find the right point: autonomous within phases, gated between phases.

knowledgeCandidates.name: Protocol vs workflow design space
knowledgeCandidates.description: program.md (protocol: one agent, one metric, infinite loop) vs SKILL.md (workflow: multi-agent, multi-phase, convergence). Different tools for different constraint spaces. When to use which?
knowledgeCandidates.relevance_to_home: Informs skill format evolution and JASON-OS design.

contentCandidates.name: analysis.ipynb — Experiment Results Methodology
contentCandidates.relevance_to_home: Framework for analyzing agent experiment history. Apply to review-metrics.jsonl, learning-routes.jsonl progress visualization.

contentCandidates.name: Hidden Multi-Agent Architecture (.gitignore)
contentCandidates.relevance_to_home: worktrees/ + queue/ + generated CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md. Multi-agent experiment infrastructure. Mirrors your worktree usage.

antiPatternCandidates.name: No-license-on-purpose trap
antiPatternCandidates.description: Karpathy can get away with no license because he's Karpathy. 9,611 forks in legal ambiguity. Don't follow this example for JASON-OS.

antiPatternCandidates.name: Single-metric optimization trap
antiPatternCandidates.description: val_bpb is clean because the problem has one unambiguous metric. Most real work has competing metrics. Don't flatten multi-objective problems into one number to look like autoresearch.
antiPatternCandidates.relevance_to_home: Skill-audit, agent quality, code review — all have multiple dimensions. Don't collapse them.

cross_repo_connections.detail: Both use Markdown instruction files for agents (program.md vs SKILL.md). Different abstraction levels.
Autoresearch is agent-AS-researcher. CLI-Anything is agent-AS-operator. Different agent roles.
Both involve autonomous agent improvement loops. MemSkill: skill evolution. Autoresearch: experiment evolution.
